agent.name: __eval_tdd
agent.taskDescription: Summarise the key benefits of test-driven development in software engineering.

judgeCriteria.name: Relevance
judgeCriteria.rubric: Does the output directly address the benefits of TDD? Does it stay on topic without irrelevant tangents?

judgeCriteria.name: Completeness
judgeCriteria.rubric: Does the output cover multiple distinct benefits of TDD (e.g., fewer bugs, better design, documentation, confidence to refactor)? Are at least 3 benefits mentioned?

agent.name: __eval_climate
agent.taskDescription: Provide a brief overview of the main causes and effects of climate change.

judgeCriteria.name: Factual accuracy
judgeCriteria.rubric: Are the stated causes and effects of climate change scientifically accurate? No misinformation or misleading claims?

agent.name: __eval_rest
agent.taskDescription: In exactly one sentence, explain what a REST API is.
agent.systemPrompt: Be extremely concise. Never use more than 2 sentences total across summary and details.

judgeCriteria.name: Conciseness
judgeCriteria.rubric: Is the response appropriately concise? Does it explain REST APIs in 1-2 sentences without unnecessary elaboration?
